raw_consumer_statement:
Summary : Purchased flights on XXXX for two passengers on XX/XX/XXXX. Cancelled the flights for both passengers on XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX refunded the purchase total in full to my credit card used for the purchase. To date, the refunds have not posted to my credit card account.
Credit card is Shop Your Way Mastercard issued by Citibank. After waiting 10 business days for the refunds from XXXX to post, a credit card customer service rep advised us to open a billing dispute to launch an investigation. Separate billing dispute case IDs were opened for each passenger 's airfare.
Billing dispute Case IDs :
XXXX Date submitted : XX/XX/XXXX Amount : {$330.00} Status : Active
XXXX Date submitted : XX/XX/XXXX Amount : {$330.00} Status : Closed
This case was closed with no resolution - credit card issuer claimed that they did not receive additional supporting information but I did send complete documentation multiple times via online upload and fax
XXXX ( reopened case of XXXX )
Date submitted : XX/XX/XXXX Amount : {$330.00} Status : Active
Currently, there have been no resolution from the credit card company. We have so far only received letters from them about the following : -2 disputes opened
-2 requests for supporting documentation and a form to fill out, sign, and return
-1 dispute resolution ( for case XXXX )
-1 dispute reopened ( as case XXXX )
-1 request for supporting documentation and a form to fill out, sign, and return
I sent the credit card company supporting documentation multiple times via upload on their website. On XX/XX/XXXX, I also faxed them this supporting documentation which are attached to this complaint.
